title: Senior Software Engineer - LG Soft India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - LG Soft India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
LG Soft India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Noida operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LG Soft India:
LG Soft India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Soft India!
